message:
Running command: # GPL-0326 again: reset_n_pad_a_esd_0_h is not in the DEF template PINS
# Extract ALL pin names from the DEF template

grep "^   - " /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/fixed_dont_change/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.def | awk '{print $2}' | head -10
